recommendations.title: Troll 2
recommendations.overview: When a dangerous new troll unleashes devastation across their homeland, Nora, Andreas and Major Kris embark on their most perilous mission yet.

recommendations.title: Troll
recommendations.overview: When an explosion in the Norwegian mountains awakens an ancient troll, officials appoint a fearless paleontologist to stop it from wreaking deadly havoc.

recommendations.title: Cold Prey
recommendations.overview: When one of them breaks a leg, five friends snowboarding in the Norwegian mountains take shelter in an abandoned ski lodge and soon realize they’re not alone.

recommendations.title: Tomb Raider
recommendations.overview: Lara Croft, the fiercely independent daughter of a missing adventurer, must push herself beyond her limits when she finds herself on the island where her father disappeared.

recommendations.title: Escape
recommendations.overview: Ten years after the Black Death devastated the country, a poor family sets out on a journey to search for better living conditions. In a deserted mountain pass, they are attacked by a gang of ruthless killer thieves. The only one spared is 19 year ol

recommendations.title: Fireworks
recommendations.overview: The troubled relationship between Gianni and Nino, set in the narrow-minded and prejudicial Sicily of 1982.

recommendations.title: The Quake
recommendations.overview: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.

recommendations.title: No Escape
recommendations.overview: In their new overseas home, an American family soon finds themselves caught in the middle of a coup, and they frantically look for a safe escape in an environment where foreigners are being immediately executed.

recommendations.title: The King's Choice

recommendations.title: Breaking Surface
recommendations.overview: Two Swedish/Norwegian half sisters go on a winter diving trip in Northern Norway, when they get trapped after a rockslide.
